pb005_through_pb014_status.focused_tests: 75 passed across PB-006 through PB-020 focused governance/evidence tests
pb005_through_pb014_status.remaining_gap: Unmerged usbay/live-euria-runtime-integration still carries PB evidence/recovery deltas and must not be merged directly.

merge_readiness_matrix_definitions.SAFE_TO_DELETE_BRANCH: Merged into main; delete only after human confirmation.
merge_readiness_matrix_definitions.NEEDS_RUNTIME_EXTRACTION: Unmerged branch has runtime-relevant paths and needs minimal extraction review.
merge_readiness_matrix_definitions.ALREADY_IN_MAIN: No meaningful diff or runtime delta already incorporated.
merge_readiness_matrix_definitions.BLOCKED_NOT_MERGE_READY: Known validation, scope, or artifact blocker prevents merge.

can_be_deleted: Branches classified SAFE_TO_DELETE_BRANCH after USBAY-AUDIT/USBAY-GLOBAL23 confirm no open PR or evidence dependency remains.
can_be_ignored: Branches classified ALREADY_IN_MAIN after human confirmation.
must_become_pr: Untracked PB-143 through PB-146 evidence if USBAY wants to preserve this review lineage.
Any branch classified NEEDS_RUNTIME_EXTRACTION after minimal delta extraction.
must_remain_fail_closed: PB evidence/recovery artifacts until retention and merge scope are reviewed
any branch with runtime paths and incomplete validation
